summary: Guardian Invite Links feature fully tested. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified. All features working correctly.

Backend_API_Tests.POST /api/guardian-network/invite: PASS - 201 status, returns invite with token, invite_url, share_message
Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/guardian-network/invite/{token}: PASS - 200 status, returns invite details without auth
Backend_API_Tests.GET /api/guardian-network/invites: PASS - 200 status, returns list of user's invites
Backend_API_Tests.All relationship types: PASS - parent, friend, sibling, spouse, campus_security, other all work
Backend_API_Tests.Self-invite prevention: PASS - Returns 400 'Cannot accept your own invite'

Frontend_UI_Tests.Create Invite Link button (primary): PASS - data-testid='create-invite-btn' found, styled as primary teal button
Frontend_UI_Tests.Add Directly button (secondary): PASS - data-testid='direct-add-btn' found, styled as secondary outline
Frontend_UI_Tests.Relationship type buttons: PASS - All 6 types: parent, spouse, sibling, friend, campus_security, other
Frontend_UI_Tests.Invite created success page: PASS - data-testid='invite-created' shows with invite URL
Frontend_UI_Tests.Share message preview: PASS - Shows full share message text

Invite_Landing_Page_Tests.Benefits list: PASS - Real-time safety alerts, SOS notifications, Live location, AI risk assessments
Invite_Landing_Page_Tests.Accept button (unauthenticated): PASS - Shows 'Sign In to Accept' variant

Auth_Flow_Tests.Post-login redirect: PASS - After login, redirects back to /invite/{token}
Auth_Flow_Tests.Self-invite error UI: PASS - Shows 'Cannot accept your own invite' error

Database_Tests.guardian_invites table: PASS - Table exists, stores invites correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Invite token format uses secure base64url (secrets.token_urlsafe(32))
Proper 48-hour expiration implemented with timezone-aware datetimes
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed invites created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian Invite Links feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has 5 endpoints: POST /invite (create), GET /invite/{token} (public get), GET /invites (list), POST /invite/{token}/accept (accept), DELETE /invite/{token} (revoke). Frontend has MobileAddGuardian.jsx with Create Invite Link flow and InviteLanding.jsx for public invite acceptance. Post-login redirect uses sessionStorage 'Nagarik_pending_invite' key.
